ns0:entry.ns0:title: AzureAD/microsoft-authentication-library-common-for-objc
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/AzureAD/microsoft-authentication-library-common-for-objc
Language: objective-c
Common code used by both the Active Directory Authentication Library (ADAL) and the Microsoft Authentication Library (MSAL)

ns0:entry.ns0:title: BranchMetrics/ios-branch-deep-linking-attribution
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/BranchMetrics/ios-branch-deep-linking-attribution
Language: objective-c
The Branch iOS SDK for deep linking and attribution. Branch helps mobile apps grow with deep links / deeplinks that power paid acquisition and re-engagement campaigns, referral programs, content sharing, deep linked emails, smart banners, custom user onboarding, and more.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: SDWebImage/SDWebImage
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/SDWebImage/SDWebImage
Language: objective-c
Asynchronous image downloader with cache support as a UIImageView category

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Tunnelblick/Tunnelblick
Language: objective-c
The official Tunnelblick website is at https://tunnelblick.net; the official Tunnelblick GitHub repository is at https://github.com/Tunnelblick

ns0:entry.ns0:title: bugsnag/bugsnag-cocoa
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/bugsnag/bugsnag-cocoa
Language: objective-c
BugSnag error monitoring & exception reporter for iOS, macOS, tvOS and watchOS

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/danveloper/flash-moe
Language: objective-c

ns0:entry.ns0:title: google/promises

URL: https://github.com/google/promises
Language: objective-c
Promises is a modern framework that provides a synchronization construct for Swift and Objective-C.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: iodefog/VipVideo
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/iodefog/VipVideo
Language: objective-c
这是一个Mac/Windows聚合App，聚合常见电视/视频/音乐/小说。比如CCTV中央电视台直播免费观看, 爱奇艺、腾讯视频、芒果视频、优酷视频付费电影，VIP会员剧等免费观看，bilibili、美剧、韩剧、日剧、网易云音乐、腾讯音乐、酷狗音乐、喜马拉雅、起点、七猫、有声小说等

ns0:entry.ns0:title: jdg/MBProgressHUD
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/jdg/MBProgressHUD
Language: objective-c
MBProgressHUD + Customizations

ns0:entry.ns0:content:

ns0:entry.ns0:content:

ns0:entry.ns0:title: opa334/TrollStore
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/opa334/TrollStore
Language: objective-c
Jailed iOS app that can install IPAs permanently with arbitary entitlements and root helpers because it trolls Apple
